channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Flooded water meter pit, 3rd March
item.description:
This meter pit outside No 20 has been flooded for several months, It was reported & supposedly fixed in December but it is still full of water & meter unreadable. I reported it to Thames Water again a month ago & no change. There is either a leak in TW's pipes or the porous asphalt pavement near the tree pit is letting in water.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Selsdon Road, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: It's like the surface of the moon, 3rd March
item.description:
Potholes all Along the stretch of the crescent house parade Very dangerous A cyclist could hit one, go flying and I hate to think what would happen if a lorry is coming the other way. Serious risk of a fatality

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26, Goswell Road, City of London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken rubble, 3rd March
item.description:
Just after roadworks rubble knocked away to create pothole.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, East Street, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 15cm pot hole on Patterson Rd, 3rd March
item.description:
This pothole has recently appeared in the road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17, Patterson Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Leaf sludge, tree twigs and catkins on pavements and in gutters, 3rd March
item.description:
General debris and sludge from trees clogging gutters and pavements in Kings Ave, Park Ave and Quernmore Road for 3 months. Pin won’t move!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): College Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Heavily damaged car, 3rd March
item.description:
This car has been there for almost a month and is an eyesore. It is clearly written off and needs removing. I had visitors from Germany last week and was embarrassed driving down MY road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Canberra Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bookcase and trolley dumped, 3rd March
item.description:
Been dumped

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 43, Marion Crescent, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Os 292 Erith Road junction o f Merewood Road, 3rd March
item.description:
A paving slab is sticking up and has caused someone to fall over. Please can this be looked into with a matter of urgency.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 292, Erith Road, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Brick sticking out of the surface of pavement, 3rd March
item.description:
Is a trip hazard.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Birkbeck Road, Penge, Greater London

item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beckenham Hill Road, Southend, Greater London

item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)
